image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about MHC proteins.
Context visual: These proteins are essential for your immune system, acting like ID cards for cells.
Escalation visual: But what happens when MHC proteins malfunction? It can lead to autoimmune diseases.
Evidence visual: Research shows that variations in these proteins can influence how effectively our bodies fight infections.
Payoff visual: Understanding MHC proteins opens doors to better treatments and vaccines.
Cta visual: Curious to learn more about your immune system? Hit that follow button!
